name: Baked Whole Fish
recipeIngredient: 3/4 lb Salmon, whole or cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover the broiler pan rack with foil.
2. Place a bed of assorted sliced vegetables on the foil.
3. Lay the fish on top of the vegetables and place the bacon slices on the fish.
4. Bake at 425°F for 20-30 minutes, or until the flesh flakes easily with a fork.
5. Transfer the cooked fish and vegetables to a serving platter.
